entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A major staple food crop grown in Africa and Asia, particularly in Nigeria.

entities.name: AFRICA
entities.description: A continent where pearl millet is a major staple food.

entities.name: ASIA
entities.description: A continent where pearl millet is a major staple food.

entities.name: NIGERIA
entities.description: A country in Africa where pearl millet is consumed daily, especially in northern regions.

entities.name: STRIGA
entities.description: A parasitic weed that severely hinders the productivity of pearl millet.

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The productivity measure of pearl millet, which can be reduced by Striga infestation.

entities.name: STRIGA RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of pearl millet genotypes to resist infestation by Striga.

entities.name: BREEDING
entities.description: The process of developing new pearl millet varieties with preferred traits and resistance.

entities.name: GERMPLASM
entities.description: Genetic resources, including adapted landraces and exotic materials, used for breeding.

entities.name: STRIGA EMERGENCE
entities.description: The appearance of Striga plants, used as a feature to identify resistance in pearl millet.

entities.name: NORTHERN SAVANNAH AREAS
entities.description: Specific regions in Nigeria targeted for the development of Striga resistant pearl millet.
